dosage.form: Suntheanine (patented pure L-isomer form)

synergies.reason: L-Theanine modulates alpha brain waves while Alpha-GPC boosts acetylcholine, producing sustained calm focus

dosage.form: Dual-extracted fruiting body standardized to 30% beta-glucans and hericenones

synergies.reason: Lion's Mane promotes NGF synthesis while Bacopa enhances synaptic communication, supporting complementary neuroplasticity pathways

dosage.form: Standardized to 50% bacosides (Bacognize or Synapsa extract)

synergies.reason: Bacopa enhances cholinergic signaling while PS supports neuronal membrane fluidity, amplifying memory encoding

dosage.form: Alpha-glycerylphosphorylcholine 50% granular

synergies.reason: Alpha-GPC supplies acetylcholine precursor while L-Theanine promotes alpha wave activity, creating calm yet sharp focus

dosage.form: Soy-free sunflower-derived phosphatidylserine (Sharp-PS)

synergies.reason: Omega-3 fatty acids incorporate into PS-enriched membranes, enhancing neuronal signaling efficiency and membrane fluidity

dosage.form: Chelated magnesium bisglycinate (providing ~80mg elemental magnesium)

synergies.reason: Magnesium bisglycinate provides both magnesium and glycine; additional glycine amplifies inhibitory neurotransmission and thermoregulation for deeper sleep

antagonisms.reason: High-dose magnesium and zinc compete for absorption via shared intestinal transporters; take at least 2 hours apart

dosage.form: KSM-66 full-spectrum root extract standardized to 5% withanolides

synergies.reason: Ashwagandha lowers cortisol via HPA axis modulation while magnesium promotes GABAergic relaxation, creating synergistic stress relief

antagonisms.reason: Both are potent adaptogens acting on the HPA axis; concurrent use can cause overstimulation or blunted response — choose one based on primary goal

dosage.form: Extracted from chamomile (Matricaria chamomilla), high-purity crystalline apigenin

synergies.reason: Apigenin binds GABA-A receptors as a positive allosteric modulator while magnesium supports overall GABAergic tone for enhanced sedation

dosage.form: Pharmaceutical-grade free-form L-tryptophan

synergies.reason: B6 (as P5P) is a required cofactor for converting tryptophan to serotonin via aromatic amino acid decarboxylase

name: Glycine

dosage.form: Pharmaceutical-grade free-form glycine powder

symptoms: elevated core body temperature at night

synergies.reason: Glycine lowers core body temperature via peripheral vasodilation while magnesium enhances GABA signaling, improving overall sleep architecture

dosage.form: Enzymatically synthesized beta-nicotinamide mononucleotide, >99% purity

synergies.reason: NMN raises NAD+ levels as substrate while resveratrol activates SIRT1 which requires NAD+ as a cofactor, creating a powerful sirtuin-activating stack

dosage.form: Micronized trans-resveratrol from Polygonum cuspidatum, >98% purity

synergies.reason: Resveratrol activates SIRT1 enzymatic activity while NMN ensures adequate NAD+ substrate availability, maximizing sirtuin-mediated longevity pathways

dosage.form: Kaneka Ubiquinol (reduced form of CoQ10) in lipid-based softgel for enhanced absorption

synergies.reason: CoQ10 optimizes existing mitochondrial electron transport chain function while PQQ stimulates mitochondrial biogenesis, increasing both quality and quantity of mitochondria

dosage.form: BioPQQ (natural fermentation-derived pyrroloquinoline quinone disodium salt)

synergies.reason: PQQ activates PGC-1alpha to trigger new mitochondria formation while CoQ10 ensures these new mitochondria function optimally in ATP production

dosage.form: Derived from Haematococcus pluvialis microalgae, supercritical CO2 extracted

synergies.reason: Astaxanthin protects omega-3 fatty acids from lipid peroxidation, preserving their anti-inflammatory potency and improving bioavailability

dosage.form: Rice-derived phytoceramides (Ceramide-PCD) standardized to glucosylceramides

synergies.reason: Phytoceramides restore the lipid barrier matrix while hyaluronic acid retains moisture within the dermis, providing comprehensive skin hydration from different mechanisms

dosage.form: Low molecular weight hyaluronic acid (< 100 kDa) for enhanced oral bioavailability

synergies.reason: Vitamin C stimulates endogenous hyaluronic acid synthesis by fibroblasts, amplifying the effect of supplemental HA intake

dosage.form: Liposomal-encapsulated ascorbic acid in phospholipid vesicles for bypass of intestinal absorption limits

synergies.reason: Vitamin C is an essential cofactor for prolyl hydroxylase and lysyl hydroxylase, enzymes required for collagen triple helix stabilization and crosslinking

dosage.form: Hydrolyzed bovine collagen peptides (Type I & III), enzymatically broken to 2-5 kDa for optimal absorption

synergies.reason: Vitamin C is required for hydroxylation of proline and lysine residues during collagen synthesis, making it indispensable for converting ingested peptides into functional collagen fibers

dosage.form: Cholecalciferol from lanolin, microencapsulated in MCT oil for fat-soluble absorption

synergies.reason: D3 upregulates calcium absorption while K2 activates osteocalcin and matrix GLA protein to direct calcium into bones and away from arterial walls, preventing vascular calcification

dosage.form: MenaQ7 all-trans menaquinone-7 from Bacillus subtilis natto fermentation

synergies.reason: K2 MK-7 activates vitamin K-dependent proteins (osteocalcin, MGP) that properly direct the increased calcium absorption caused by D3 supplementation

dosage.form: Triglyceride-form fish oil (wild-caught small fish), providing 1200mg EPA + 800mg DHA, IFOS 5-star certified

synergies.reason: Astaxanthin is a lipophilic antioxidant that protects EPA/DHA from oxidation, preserving omega-3 integrity both in the supplement and in vivo

antagonisms.reason: SAFETY FLAG: Omega-3 at therapeutic doses (>2g EPA+DHA) may potentiate anticoagulant effects of warfarin, aspirin, and other blood thinners — consult physician before combining

dosage.form: Zinc picolinate chelate (providing ~7mg elemental zinc per capsule)

synergies.reason: Vitamin C and zinc jointly support immune cell function — C enhances neutrophil motility while zinc is critical for T-cell maturation

antagonisms.reason: Zinc induces metallothionein in enterocytes which binds copper and prevents its absorption; prolonged zinc supplementation above 30mg/day can induce copper deficiency
Zinc and magnesium compete for shared divalent cation transporters in the intestine; separate doses by at least 2 hours for optimal absorption

dosage.form: Full-spectrum methylated B-complex: B1 benfotiamine, B2 riboflavin-5-phosphate, B3 niacinamide, B5 pantethine, B6 pyridoxal-5-phosphate, B9 L-methylfolate (Quatrefolic), B12 methylcobalamin + adenosylcobalamin, biotin

synergies.reason: Vitamin B6 (as P5P) serves as a required cofactor for converting 5-HTP to serotonin, amplifying L-tryptophan supplementation efficacy

dosage.form: SelenoExcell high-selenium yeast providing selenomethionine and full spectrum of selenium species

synergies.reason: Selenium-dependent deiodinase enzymes convert T4 to active T3 thyroid hormone; adequate selenium supports thyroid function alongside D3 immune modulation

dosage.form: Standardized to 3% rosavins and 1% salidroside (SHR-5 extract)

synergies.reason: Rhodiola improves oxygen utilization and reduces perceived exertion while creatine boosts phosphocreatine stores, enhancing both aerobic and anaerobic performance

antagonisms.reason: Both are potent adaptogens modulating the HPA axis; stacking may cause receptor desensitization, unpredictable cortisol fluctuations, or blunted adaptogenic response — use one at a time

dosage.form: Creapure micronized creatine monohydrate (German-manufactured, HPLC tested for purity)

synergies.reason: Creatine saturates phosphocreatine stores for rapid ATP regeneration while Rhodiola reduces perceived exertion, enabling higher training volume and intensity

dosage.form: Fruiting body extract standardized to 0.3% cordycepin and 25% beta-glucans

synergies.reason: Cordyceps enhances oxygen delivery and ATP production via cordycepin while CoQ10 optimizes mitochondrial electron transport, boosting overall aerobic energy output
